description: Pinterest is a visual discovery and bookmarking platform used by creators, advertisers, merchants, and consumers to publish and organize Pins and boards. Its developer platform supports integrations for content, ads, catalogs, analytics, and conversion tracking.
summary: Pinterest exposes a documented REST API v5 at `https://api.pinterest.com/v5` with an official OpenAPI spec and an official Python SDK package; authentication is via OAuth 2.0 app credentials and bearer access tokens, with optional developer test tokens for limited testing.
